infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: JobForge uses the camera to capture site photos for estimates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: JobForge accesses your photo library to attach site photos to estimates.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: JobForge uses the microphone for video recording.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: JobForge saves site photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: JobForge sends reminder notifications for follow-ups, appointments, and invoice reminders.
